footer.subtitle: Knowledge before Capital.
footer.title: Nodra
hero.description: Nodra is built on one belief: people should understand Web3 before they put money into it. Everything else follows from that.
hero.title: Why Nodra Exists
meta.title: About — Nodra
mission.p1: Most people's first contact with crypto is a price chart, not an explanation. Nodra exists to flip that order: give people, communities, creators and companies real understanding of Web3 first, and let confidence follow from that, not from hype.
mission.p2: Education is one part of that, not the whole of it. Alongside teaching, Nodra builds practical tools and experiences that make Web3 usable day to day, not just explainable.
mission.title: Understanding Before Speculation
principles.card1.text: Academy, Engage, and everything that comes after are built as separate products under one brand, each free to evolve at its own pace.
principles.card1.title: Independent Products
principles.card2.text: The core educational content stays free and open. Nodra earns trust by being useful first.
principles.card2.title: Free, Open Content
principles.card3.text: Every product Nodra ships is built around the same idea: know what you're doing before you do it.
principles.card3.title: Understand, Then Act
principles.title: How We Build
roadmap.academy.description: 10 free modules covering blockchain fundamentals, DeFi and security, each with a quiz to check understanding.
roadmap.academy.title: Nodra Academy
roadmap.description: Nodra grows one vertical at a time. Here's what's live, what's being built, and what's next.
roadmap.engage.description: Quizzes, minigames and community tools for events, creators and communities, currently in development.
roadmap.engage.title: Nodra Engage
roadmap.next.description: New verticals launch as they're ready. No fixed dates, no overpromising, just steady progress.
roadmap.next.title: What's Next
roadmap.title: Where Things Stand
